mapper.select: SELECT NOTC.SUBJECT , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM , NOTC.VIEW_TYPE , (NOTC.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , (NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as START_DATE , (NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') as END_DATE , (NOTC.REG_DATE, ' YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DATE , GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , NOTC.REG_USER_ID REG_USER_ID , NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM , (NOTC.POPUP_FLAG, '0') AS POPUP_FLAG , NOTC.FIXED_TOP_FLAG , NOTC.COMMENT1 , NOTC.COMMENT2 , TXTH.SIGN_VALUE , TXTH.VID_RANDOM , TXTH.IRS_NUM FROM STOCNOTC NOTC LEFT JOIN STOCTXTH TXTH ON (NOTC.GATE_CD = TXTH.GATE_CD AND NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM = TXTH.TEXT_NUM) WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTC.NOTICE_NUM = #{NOTICE_NUM}

SELECT NOTC.SUBJECT , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM ,(NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYY')'년 ' (NOTC.START_DATE, 'MM') '월 ' (NOTC.START_DATE, 'DD') '일' AS START_DATE ,(NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYY')'년 ' (NOTC.END_DATE, 'MM') '월 ' (NOTC.END_DATE, 'DD') '일' AS END_DATE , NOTC.COMMENT1 AS UNIT_PRC_TEXT , NOTC.COMMENT2 AS AP_TEXT , SUBSTR(CMSV.IRS_NUM, 0, 3)'-' SUBSTR(CMSV.IRS_NUM, 4, 2)'-' SUBSTR(CMSV.IRS_NUM, 6) AS IRS_NUM_TEXT , CMSV.COMPANY_NM AS COMPANY_NM ,CMSV.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,CMSV.ZIP_CD AS ZIP_CD ,CMSV.ADDR1 AS ADDR1 , CMSV.ADDR2 AS ADDR2 ,(CMSV.SIGN_DATE, 'YYYY')'년 ' (CMSV.SIGN_DATE, 'MM') '월 ' (CMSV.SIGN_DATE, 'DD') '일' AS SIGN_DATE_TEXT , CMSV.VENDOR_IRS_NUM AS VENDOR_IRS_NUM , CMSV.VENDOR_NM AS VENDOR_NM ,CMSV.VENDOR_CEO_NM AS VENDOR_CEO_NM ,CMSV.VENDOR_ZIP_CD AS VENDOR_ZIP_CD ,CMSV.VENDOR_ADDR1 AS VENDOR_ADDR1 ,CMSV.VENDOR_ADDR2 AS VENDOR_ADDR2 FROM STOCCMSV CMSV JOIN STOCNOTC NOTC ON (CMSV.GATE_CD = NOTC.GATE_CD AND CMSV.FORM_NUM = NOTC.NOTICE_NUM) WHERE CMSV.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CMSV.COMPANY_CD = #{COMPANY_CD} AND CMSV.SIGN_ID = #{SIGN_ID} AND CMSV.SIGN_SQ = #{SIGN_SQ}
